assertionResults.title: returns available=false when all bits are 1 and DB confirms email exists

assertionResults.title: returns available=true when all bits are 1 but DB finds nothing (false positive)

assertionResults.title: normalizes email to lowercase before hashing

assertionResults.title: normalizes all emails before setting bits

assertionResults.title: does nothing when given an empty array
